element_type_count: Count the visible {target_element_plural}. How many are there?
What is the total number of {target_element_plural}?
highest_element_count_panel: Which labeled panel has the highest number of visible {target_element_plural}?
Choose the panel label with the most visible {target_element_plural}.
Among the four labeled panels, which one contains the greatest number of {target_element_plural}?
Which option panel shows the most {target_element_plural}?
What letter labels the panel with the highest count of visible {target_element_plural}?
lowest_element_count_panel: Which labeled panel has the lowest number of visible {target_element_plural}?
Choose the panel label with the fewest visible {target_element_plural}.
Among the four labeled panels, which one contains the smallest number of {target_element_plural}?
Which option panel shows the fewest {target_element_plural}?
What letter labels the panel with the lowest count of visible {target_element_plural}?
element_color_count: How many {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} are on the fixture?
Count the {target_color_label} {target_element_plural}. How many are there?
What is the number of {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} on the surface?
Looking across the fixture, how many {target_element_plural} are {target_color_label}?
color_count_after_operations: Suppose these changes happen: {operation_phrase}. How many {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} are there after all changes?
Start with the visible fixture, then apply these changes: {operation_phrase}. What is the final number of {target_color_label} {target_element_plural}?
After the following changes, how many {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} are there: {operation_phrase}?
Using the visible fixture as the starting state, apply {operation_phrase}. What is the resulting count of {target_color_label} {target_element_plural}?
If these changes are made to the fixture, {operation_phrase}, how many {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} are there in total?
recolor_board_match: Apply this recolor to the original board: {recolor_phrase}. Which labeled candidate board shows the result?
On the original board, suppose {recolor_phrase}. Which candidate board is correct?
Starting from the original board, recolor so that {recolor_phrase}. Which option matches?
If {recolor_phrase} on the original board, which labeled board shows the result?
Use the original board as the starting state and apply this recolor: {recolor_phrase}. Which candidate board matches?
scoped_element_color_count: Count the {target_color_label} {target_element_plural} in {scope_phrase}. How many are there?
In {scope_phrase}, what is the number of {target_color_label} {target_element_plural}?
Looking only at {scope_phrase}, how many {target_element_plural} are {target_color_label}?
most_frequent_color_option: Which labeled option names the color that appears most often among the visible {target_element_plural}?
Choose the option label that names the color used by the most visible {target_element_plural}.
Which text option names the color with the highest count on the fixture?
Among the labeled text options, which one names the color that appears the most on the fixture?
What letter labels the option naming the color that appears most often on the fixture?
absent_color_option: Which labeled option names a color that does not appear on the fixture?
Choose the option label that names the color absent from the visible {target_element_plural}.
Which text option names a color with zero visible {target_element_plural} on the fixture?
Among the labeled text options, which one names a color that is not present on the fixture?
What letter labels the option naming the color that does not appear on the fixture?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:element_type_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of counted surface elements
query:element_type_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted surface element

query:highest_element_count_panel.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected panel label as a single capital letter
query:highest_element_count_panel.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the selected panel

query:lowest_element_count_panel.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected panel label as a single capital letter
query:lowest_element_count_panel.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the selected panel

query:element_color_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:element_color_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted colored surface element

query:color_count_after_operations.answer_hint: set "answer" to the final count as an integer after applying the listed changes
query:color_count_after_operations.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each original visible target-color element used as the starting count; do not mark hypothetical added elements

query:recolor_board_match.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate board label as a single capital letter
query:recolor_board_match.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the selected candidate board

query:scoped_element_color_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:scoped_element_color_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted colored surface element in the requested row or column

query:most_frequent_color_option.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option label as a single capital letter
query:most_frequent_color_option.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the selected text option card

query:absent_color_option.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option label as a single capital letter
query:absent_color_option.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the selected text option card
